title: rowspan colspan
author: OlegFromOmsk
body:
Hello
I need Excel file with columns from this table:

```
<thead>
<tr>
<th rowspan="2" colspan="1"></th> 
<th rowspan="2" colspan="1"></th>
<th rowspan="2" colspan="1"></th>
<th rowspan="1" colspan="2"></th>
</tr> 
<tr>
<th></th>
<th></th>
</tr>
</thead>
```

How I can do it?
Thanks

comments.author: anirudh411
comments.body: Is there any update on this?
